ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recalls" (
  "recall_number" TEXT /* Unique recall identifier */,
  "recall_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique event ID for recall tracking */,
  "device_type" INTEGER /* Indicates if device is a physical type */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code associated with the device */,
  "regulation_description" TEXT /* Regulation details related to the recall */,
  "medical_specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty associated with the device */,
  "review_panel" TEXT /* Panel reviewing the recall */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., 510(k)) */,
  "trade_name" TEXT /* Trade name of the product */,
  "main_name" TEXT /* Main name of the product */,
  "recall_class" TEXT /* Class of the recall */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the recall was posted */,
  "year_posted" INTEGER /* Year the recall was posted */,
  "recalling_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer recalling the device */,
  "reason_for_recall" TEXT /* Reasons behind the recall */,
  "fda_determined_cause" TEXT /* Cause determined by FDA */,
  "action" TEXT /* Actions taken for recall */,
  "consumer_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for consumers regarding recall */,
  "clean_quantity" INTEGER /* Clean quantity of recalled devices */,
  "quantity_in_commerce" INTEGER /* Quantity of recalled devices in commerce */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Distribution details for the recalled devices */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Current status of the recall */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the recall was terminated */,
  "time_to_terminate" INTEGER /* Time taken to terminate the recall */,
  "merged_quantities" INTEGER /* Merged quantities from different recall events */,
  "recall_initiation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recall was initiated */,
  "recall_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the recall became effective */,
  "recall_completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the recall was completed */,
  "recall_reason_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the reason for the recall */,
  "recall_impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the recall on patients and healthcare providers */,
  "recall_documents" TEXT /* Links or references to additional documents related to the recall */,
  "recall_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the recall */,
  "recall_auditor" TEXT /* Name or ID of the auditor who reviewed the recall */,
  "recall_audited_date" TEXT /* Date when the recall was audited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_submission_type FOREIGN KEY ("submission_type") REFERENCES submission_types ("submission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_medical_specialty FOREIGN KEY ("medical_specialty") REFERENCES medical_specialties ("specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_reason_for_recall FOREIGN KEY ("reason_for_recall") REFERENCES recalls ("reason_for_recall"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_review_panel FOREIGN KEY ("review_panel") REFERENCES review_panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_recall_class FOREIGN KEY ("recall_class") REFERENCES recall_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_recalling_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("recalling_manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Official name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "manufacturer_website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_fax" TEXT /* Fax number for the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "manufacturer_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "recall_number" TEXT /* Reference to the recall number */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_responsible_party" TEXT /* Entity or individual responsible for the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_recall_number FOREIGN KEY ("recall_number") REFERENCES recalls ("recall_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "recall_number" TEXT /* Reference to the recall number */,
  "distribution_details" TEXT /* Details about the distribution of recalled products */,
  "distribution_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution of the recalled product began */,
  "distribution_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution of the recalled product ended */,
  "distribution_volume" INTEGER /* Volume or quantity of the recalled product distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributions_recall_number FOREIGN KEY ("recall_number") REFERENCES recalls ("recall_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction record */,
  "recall_number" TEXT /* Reference to the recall number */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions given to consumers regarding the recall */,
  "instruction_type" TEXT /* Type of instruction (e.g., safety, return, replacement) */,
  "instruction_language" TEXT /* Language in which the instruction is provided */,
  "instruction_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the instruction became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_instructions_recall_number FOREIGN KEY ("recall_number") REFERENCES recalls ("recall_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the recall class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the recall class */,
  "class_severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the recall class (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "class_guidelines" TEXT /* Guidelines or procedures for handling recalls of this class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "regulation_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  "regulation_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation expires */,
  "regulation_authority" TEXT /* Regulatory authority responsible for the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "specialty_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the specialty */,
  "specialty_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the specialty */,
  "specialty_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person for the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review panel */,
  "panel_name" TEXT /* Name of the review panel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the panel */,
  "panel_chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the panel */,
  "panel_meeting_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of panel meetings */,
  "panel_decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the panel made a decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_types" (
  "submission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission type */,
  "submission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the submission type */,
  "submission_guidelines" TEXT /* Guidelines for the submission type */,
  "submission_form" TEXT /* Form or document required for the submission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Current status of the recall */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "status_updated_by" TEXT /* User or entity who updated the status */,
  "status_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "recall_number" TEXT /* Reference to the recall number accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
